source_jobs.title: Account Executive (Austin)
source_jobs.description:
The Role

As a OneCrew Account Executive, join the ranks of an elite team of prospectors that generate their own pipeline from cold outreach. If daily prospecting with a great solution in hand doesn't excite you, this role is not for you. Self-source asphalt and concrete paving businesses, build pipeline and run full cycle inside sales motions of the OneCrew platform.

Training will be provided and regular coaching sessions should be expected. We want ambitious professionals who want to grow and upskill themselves and their career to grow into future roles. Come learn and grow with us!


Skills & Qualifications

 - High caliber individuals that possess high drive, adaptability, humility, integrity, and a passion for helping others.

 - Drive and capacity continuously hunt and build new pipelines.

 - 4+ years experience performing sales from a demo environment.

 - Deep understanding of pain, value and the ability to compel change.

 - Proven ability to provide extraordinary empathy and guidance to our prospective customers.

 - Experience with dynamic, multiple stakeholder deal cycles.

 - Experience utilizing a CRM and tech stack tools. Familiarity with HubSpot is a plus.

 - Experience working in a startup environment.

 - Must be based in Austin, TX (3 days minimum in office).



Daily and Monthly Responsibilities

 - Hunt for and Drive New Business: Identify, target, and win new logos, focusing on organizations spanning from $1M - $100M in revenue. Prospect, cold outreach and demo key stakeholders in an end-to-end cycle from initial outreach and value proposition through negotiation and closing.

 - Executive Stakeholder Engagement: Build trusted relationships at the C-suite and VP level, as well as with leaders across the organization. Challenge the status quo of customers’ current operational infrastructure and inspire a vision for how OneCrew’s platform can drive better business outcomes.

 - Solution Selling & Value Articulation: Become an expert in OneCrew’s platform, and articulate the business value of our all-in-one business platform in terms of actionable business visibility, agility, operational efficiency, and CX improvements.

 - Exceed Targets: Consistently meet and exceed your sales quotas and KPIs. Take full ownership of your territory and accounts, leveraging OneCrew’s high-performance sales culture and resources to deliver results and grow our presence.

 - Intangibles: You will succeed and excel here if you are driven, curious, humble and collaborative!

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (Fullstack)
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for a highly motivated and experienced Software Engineer to join OneCrew’s quickly growing team. You’ll play an instrumental role in defining and building out the product and platform with the co-founders and engineering team as we scale our customer base.

Location: This role is based in San Francisco with expected 3+ days in-office weekly at our FiDi office.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Focus: Building reliable, high-performing systems and features that empower paving contractors to run their businesses with clarity, accuracy, and confidence.

 - Design, build, and ship new products and features—including AI-powered automation and intelligence— that directly impact how contractors estimate jobs, manage crews, and track profitability in real time.

 - Build and ship AI-driven features that set new standards for the industry—intelligent estimating, predictive crew optimization, and automated insights that help contractors make better decisions faster

 - Own system reliability and performance: ensure our platform is secure, observable, automated, and built to scale as we grow

 - Collaborate across engineering, product, and design to translate ideas into elegant, practical solutions that customers love

 - Continuously refine our technical standards and processes—from testing and deployment to documentation and code review—to improve how we build and ship

 - Champion a culture of craftsmanship and collaboration, helping shape how our team grows, learns, and delivers together




WHO YOU ARE

 - You’re a top performer; maintaining high standards and instilling them in others

 - You’re a collaborative and proactive problem solver balancing competing priorities

 - You strive for simple, elegant solutions that meet our objectives and establish a foundation for iteration; you know when to invest and when to defer

 - You understand when to roll up your sleeves and when to empower your team


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 3-6+ years of software engineering experience in a high velocity environment

 - Familiarity with NodeJS, React, AWS, PostgreSQL tech stack a plus

 - Does not Work Authorization to work in US


WHAT WE OFFER

 - A collaborative environment of driven teammates working to capture a unique opportunity

 - Change an industry that impacts our daily lives

 - An opportunity to work directly with the founders as we scale

 - Competitive salary with significant upside potential through generous early-stage equity

 - Full medical, dental, and vision coverage (most options 100% covered)

 - Unlimited PTO



At OneCrew, we're building something special, and we need an exceptional engineer to help us realize our full potential. If you're excited about being part of a world-class engineering organization that delivers transformative technology to an industry ripe for innovation, we want to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Product Marketing (Marketing Lead)
source_jobs.description:
Define how OneCrew wins, and make the market feel it.

Paving contractors are practical buyers. They don't care about hype. They care about a clear answer to: why you, why now, why not the other guys. That answer is positioning, but positioning only matters if it shows up in pipeline, deals, and revenue.

We're hiring our first marketing leader to own both how OneCrew is positioned in the market and how that positioning translates into qualified pipeline and revenue. This is not a support role. It's a GTM ownership role. You'll work across product, sales, and leadership to turn what we build into why it matters, get that message into market, and ensure it drives measurable growth.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Positioning and messaging. Own OneCrew's positioning across our three segments:

 - scaling paving operations

 - mid-market commercial paving

 - PE-backed roll-ups and enterprise

Build and continuously refine the messaging frameworks, value propositions, and talk tracks that actually get used in deals. You are accountable for making sure the market and our sales team can clearly understand why we win.

Pipeline and GTM strategy. Own how positioning turns into pipeline. Drive:

 - ICP definition and refinement

 - segment prioritization based on revenue efficiency

 - campaign strategy across outbound, inbound, partnerships, and events

 - how messaging shows up across every buyer touchpoint

We use agencies and tools for execution. You own the strategy, direction, and outcomes.

Sales enablement. Build the assets and systems that help sales win:

 - pitch decks, one-pagers, and battlecards

 - objection handling and competitive positioning

 - ROI models and demo narratives

 - email sequences and follow-up frameworks

Partner directly with Glenn and the AE team. Sit in on calls, identify where deals stall, and fix it at the messaging, positioning, or process level. If deals aren't closing, you help diagnose why and fix it.

Product launches and GTM execution. Own the full launch motion for new capabilities, from positioning and narrative through sales training, customer and prospect communication, and in-product messaging. Every meaningful release has a clear strategy, a defined owner (you), and a measurable outcome in pipeline, adoption, or revenue.

Website and conversion surfaces. Own messaging across the website, landing pages, and campaign flows. You ensure consistency between what the market sees, what sales says, and what the product delivers. Execution may be delegated. Accountability is yours.

Customer and market insight loops. Stay close to the market. Run customer and prospect interviews, join sales calls and QBRs, and analyze win/loss data. Continuously refine positioning, ICP definition, and buying triggers. You don't guess what resonates, you know.

Pricing and packaging support. Partner with leadership on pricing strategy, packaging and SKUs, and monetization opportunities. Own how changes are communicated and adopted in the market.

Competitive intelligence. Maintain a sharp view of the market, from competitors in active deals to emerging players and shifting buyer expectations. Translate insights into battlecards, sales strategies, and product recommendations. When reps ask "how do we win this deal," you have the answer.

Measurement and growth accountability. Instrument and own performance across:

 - pipeline creation and quality

 - win rates by segment

 - deal velocity

 - launch impact (adoption and revenue)

 - messaging and campaign effectiveness

Kill what isn't working. Double down on what is.




WHAT YOU'LL PARTNER ON

Content production, website design, brand creative, and event logistics are supported by agency partners and internal resources. You write briefs, set direction, review outputs, and ensure strategic alignment. You are not a content factory, but you are responsible for making sure everything shipped is strategically correct and effective.




THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

 - You're strat

notes: Small sample size, but suggests a mix of sales, marketing, and engineering roles.
